extract: Celebi (Japanese: セレビィ Celebi) is a dual-type Psychic/Grass Mythical Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Celebi is the guardian of Ilex Forest. It is the last Pokémon in the Johto Pokédex. Celebi was officially revealed in the July 2000 issue of CoroCoro.
